title: mentha royleana var. royleana
intro: Mentha royleana var. royleana, also known as Royle's mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Royle's mint include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and help with respiratory problems such as colds and bronchitis. Royle's mint can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues or simply enjoyed for its refreshing flavor and aroma.
